title: Another out-of-memory problem with for loop

features.name: for loop downcounter with function-derived step
features.description: Code should include a for loop where the loop variable decrements by a step value derived from a function call, with condition checking if loop variable is >= 0

features.name: for loop with signed integer comparison to zero
features.description: Code should include a for loop with a signed integer loop variable where the termination condition checks >= 0
features.snippet:
integer i;
always @(*) begin
  for (i = 4; i >= 0; i = i - 4) begin
  end
end

features.name: function returning loop step used in for loop
features.description: Code should include a function whose return value is used as the step in a for loop decrement
